race.comment: COLOUR CIRCLE (4) just gets the nod. He showed good early muster and fought on to finish second last start over 1728m at Sale, his second runner-up finish in a row. Doubt he has to do any more to be breaking through. DETERMINATO (5) ran on strongly only to just miss last start over 1600m at Cranbourne and this looks a touch easier, expect he's hard to hold out late. CHATEAU DANCER (10) finished second last time over 1411m at Sale when resuming from a spell, beaten 2.25 lengths. Fitter now and will be charging late up in trip. CHURCHILL LANE (3) presents third up and ready to fire. He was quickly up in trip last start and should take catching with Newitt up on speed.
